tasks.label: Mock: Start server
tasks.detail: Run the local mock controller. Bind host is inherited from the environment so the devcontainer's `remoteEnv` (0.0.0.0) wins inside the container while local runs stay on the __main__.py default (127.0.0.1). Stop via the task panel.

tasks.label: Docs: Serve
tasks.detail: Run mkdocs serve at http://localhost:8000 with live reload. Binds 0.0.0.0 so the forwarded 8000 port works in devcontainers/Codespaces; the docs preview is read-only static content with no auth, so LAN exposure is acceptable for a dev preview.

tasks.label: Docs: Build (strict)
tasks.detail: Build the documentation in strict mode (matches CI).

tasks.label: Test: Unit suite
tasks.detail: Run pytest with coverage (integration tests are excluded by default).

tasks.label: Test: Integration (mock smoke)
tasks.detail: Run only the opt-in integration tests that boot the mock as a subprocess.

tasks.label: Lint: Ruff check
tasks.detail: Run ruff in lint-only mode (matches CI).

tasks.label: Lint: Mypy
tasks.detail: Run mypy in strict mode against src/ (matches CI).

tasks.label: Verify: All CI checks
tasks.detail: Run every CI gate locally: ruff, mypy, pytest, mkdocs build.
